name: Basilisk
summary: Place items at all four Temple locations, then spend 30+ combined item value (each placed item counts double) at the Basilisk's location to defeat it.
objective: The Basilisk's scales can only be pierced by items blessed by the Gods.

powers.name: Petrifying Gaze
powers.description: The Basilisk moves to the current player's location. That hero takes one hit, which can only be blocked with a Purple item.

steps.title: Gods' Blessing
steps.description: Place an item on the Basilisk's card while standing at each of the four Temple locations (Temple of Athena, Temple of Hades, Temple of Nyx, Temple of Zeus) - four items in total, one per Temple.

steps.title: Shatter the Scales
steps.description: Once all four Temple items are placed, spend items totaling 30+ combined strength at the Basilisk's location to defeat it. The four placed items count towards this total, each worth its strength plus 2 bonus points.
